candidate_nulls.SIGN_INVERSION: Same times, costs and path; side flipped.
candidate_nulls.FIVE_SESSION_SIGNAL_DELAY: Same side and local clocks on the fifth later eligible session; invalid roll/gap windows skipped.
candidate_nulls.OPPORTUNITY_COUNT_MATCHED_NON_SIGNAL_DAY: For each candidate, take the earliest chronologically available eligible non-signal session after each signal, without reuse, at the same local clocks and cycling the frozen signal sides; invalid roll/gap windows skipped.

SIM_EXPLOIT_definition: base expectancy strictly positive and stress-2x expectancy non-positive
CONTRE: The non-signal-day control matches opportunity count and clock but not necessarily volatility regime; beating it is necessary but not sufficient evidence.
